title: Index
content:
Congratulations! Mr. Akhil Thakur for qualifying Himachal Pradesh Administrative Service (HAS) Exam. Congratulations! Mr. Akhil Thakur for qualifying Himachal Pradesh Administrative Service (HAS) Exam. JUIT Alumni Mr. Akhil Thakur (Batch 2017) has qualified Himachal Pradesh Administrative Service (HAS) Exam. He graduated in 2017 from the Electronics and Communication Engineering branch of JUIT. JUIT family wishes him the very best as he embarks on this new and impactful journey in public service. 2025-01-09 B.Tech Student Mr. Akhil Thakur, (Batch 2013-2017), Electronics and Communication Enginee... View More Hilly Rambling Newsletter (Sept-Oct 2024) Hilly Rambling Newsletter (Sept-Oct 2024) 2024-11-28 Bimonthly NewsLetter of JUIT View More Hilly Rambling Newsletter (July-August 2024) Hilly Rambling Newsletter (July-August 2024) 2024-10-15 Bimonthly NewsLetter of JUIT View More Hilly Rambling Newsletter (May-June 2024) Hilly Rambling Newsletter (May-June 2024) 2024-07-19 Bimonthly NewsLetter of JUIT View More Hilly Rambling Newsletter (Mar-April 2024) Hilly Rambling Newsletter (Mar-April 2024) 2024-05-22 Bimonthly NewsLetter of JUIT View More Alumni Meet 2023 Alumni Meet 2023 The Alumni Meet convened at the Jaypee University of Information Technology on December 9th, organized by the JUIT Alumni Cell. It was met with enthusiasm as approximately 50 alumni, accompanied by their families, attended the event. Among the distinguished guests were Ankit Aggarwal, Founder & CEO of Unstop, and Suhail Sharma, an IPS officer. The proceedings unfolded in two distinct segments,
commencing with a ceremonial lamp lighting by the Vice-Chancellor Prof. (Dr.)
Rajendra Kumar Sharma, Registrar Major General Rakesh Bassi (Retd.), Dean of
Academics Prof. Dr. Ashok Kumar Gupta and Dr. Saurabh Bansal. The initial phase of the event featured insightful speeches from the
Vice-Chancellor and Registrar of the University, setting the tone for an
engaging interaction between the alumni and the university's faculty and staff. The alumni received tokens of appreciation in the form of mementoes and JUIT T-shirts, and Dr Tanu Sharma skillfully hosted the entire session; following this, a lavish lunch was served, fostering a relaxed atmosphere conducive to networking and recalling shared experiences. As the day progressed, an entertaining cultural and DJ night, masterminded by the JYC team, unfolded in the evening, creating an ambience of joy and reflection. The alumni also revisited their hostels and cherished locations on
campus, evoking a sense of nostalgia. This reunion not only facilitated
connections between past and present members of the JUIT family but also
allowed alumni to witness the growth and evolution of their alma mater. The seamless coordination by the JUIT alumni Cell team and faculty coordinators Dr Saurabh Bansal, Dr Tanu Sharma, Dr Nishant Jain and Dr Surjit Kumar Hazra ensured the event's smooth execution, making it a memorable gathering for all participants. The Alumni Meet underscored the enduring bonds within the
university and the collective pride shared by the JUIT community. 2023-12-09 The Alumni Meet convened at JUIT on December 9th, 2023 organized by the JUIT Alumni Cell,... Sc. Biotechnology of Department of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics, Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat, Solan, HP, got commissioned in Artillery. Natasha joyfully informed this to Head of the department and her guide Prof. Sudhir Syal. Prof. Syal told us that even during her masters degree, she involved herself to solve the problem of waste management disposal at high altitudes especially for Indian forces. The Vice Chancellor Prof. R.K. Sharma congratulated her on this achievement. Natasha was selected in the training with All India Rank 1. all the family members of Natasha re are very happy with her achievement. JUIT family also extend the best wishes to Natasha for her progressive and successful career ahead. 2023-09-19 Natasha Panchal – an alumnus of M. Sc.
